title: Homelab from Scratch
description: Build a real Kubernetes homelab end-to-end — four Ubuntu boxes, a private WireGuard mesh, K3s with Calico, a single hardened cloud edge, automatic TLS via cert-manager and Cloudflare, Sealed-Secrets-driven GitOps, PostgreSQL, Keycloak, and a CI/CD pipeline that deploys for you. Whoami is the demo app; the architecture is real.
